requirement_topic.en: Photobiological Safety — Blue Light Hazard (SONCAP on NIS IEC 62471 Risk Groups)
requirement_topic.zh: 光生物安全——蓝光危害（SONCAP，依 NIS IEC 62471 危险组别）
requirement_topic.zht: 光生物安全——藍光危害（SONCAP，依 NIS IEC 62471 危險組別）

summary.en: Photobiological safety of LED lamps and luminaires for the Nigerian market is assessed against the Nigerian Industrial Standard adopting IEC 62471 (NIS IEC 62471 — Photobiological safety of lamps and lamp systems), which classifies products into risk groups from RG0 (Exempt — no hazard) through RG1 (Low), RG2 (Moderate) to RG3 (High), based on blue-light-weighted radiance and irradiance limits. Within SONCAP, the photobiological risk-group test report forms part of the test-report package supporting the Product Certificate for in-scope LED light sources and luminaires. RG2 and RG3 products carry usage restrictions and warning requirements. Testing is to the SON-accepted edition by a SON-recognised laboratory, and a per-shipment SONCAP Certificate is required before vessel loading for port clearance.
summary.zh: 尼日利亚市场 LED 灯及灯具的光生物安全依据采用 IEC 62471 的尼日利亚工业标准（NIS IEC 62471——灯和灯系统的光生物安全）评估，依蓝光加权辐亮度和辐照度限值将产品分为从 RG0（豁免——无危害）经 RG1（低）、RG2（中等）至 RG3（高）的危险组别。在 SONCAP 内，光生物危险组别检测报告构成支持范围内 LED 光源及灯具产品证书的检测报告组成部分。RG2 与 RG3 产品存在使用限制及警示要求。检测须按 SON 接受版本、由 SON 认可实验室进行，且须就每批货物在装船前取得 SONCAP 证书以供港口清关。
summary.zht: 奈及利亞市場 LED 燈及燈具的光生物安全依據採用 IEC 62471 的奈及利亞工業標準（NIS IEC 62471——燈和燈系統的光生物安全）評估，依藍光加權輻亮度和輻照度限值將產品分為從 RG0（豁免——無危害）經 RG1（低）、RG2（中等）至 RG3（高）的危險組別。在 SONCAP 內，光生物危險組別檢測報告構成支持範圍內 LED 光源及燈具產品證書的檢測報告組成部分。RG2 與 RG3 產品存在使用限制及警示要求。檢測須按 SON 接受版本、由 SON 認可實驗室進行，且須就每批貨物在裝船前取得 SONCAP 證書以供港口清關。

standards_or_laws: NIS IEC 62471 — Photobiological safety of lamps and lamp systems (Nigerian Industrial Standard adopting IEC 62471 — risk group classification RG0–RG3)
SONCAP — Product Certificate + per-shipment SONCAP Certificate (photobiological risk-group test report forms part of the PC package)

summary.en: China has adopted GB/T 20145-2006 (Photobiological safety of lamps and lamp systems), technically equivalent to IEC 62471:2006. GB/T 20145 is a recommended standard (T = tuijian, recommended) and is not universally mandatory for all LED luminaires in the Chinese market; enforcement for residential luminaires is not uniformly prescribed. The risk-group framework (RG0–RG3) is the same as NIS IEC 62471 because both derive from IEC 62471. Chinese GB/T 20145 test reports are not recognised under the Nigerian SONCAP conformity pathway.
summary.zh: 中国已采用 GB/T 20145-2006（灯和灯系统的光生物安全），技术上等同于 IEC 62471:2006。GB/T 20145 为推荐性标准（T = 推荐），并非对所有中国市场 LED 灯具均强制；对居民灯具的执行并不统一规定。危险组别框架（RG0–RG3）与 NIS IEC 62471 相同，因二者均源自 IEC 62471。中国 GB/T 20145 检测报告不被尼日利亚 SONCAP 合格评定路径所认可。
summary.zht: 中國已採用 GB/T 20145-2006（燈和燈系統的光生物安全），技術上等同於 IEC 62471:2006。GB/T 20145 為推薦性標準（T = 推薦），並非對所有中國市場 LED 燈具均強制；對居民燈具的執行並不統一規定。危險組別框架（RG0–RG3）與 NIS IEC 62471 相同，因二者均源自 IEC 62471。中國 GB/T 20145 檢測報告不被奈及利亞 SONCAP 合格評定路徑所認可。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 20145-2006 — Photobiological safety of lamps and lamp systems (SAC/SAMR — recommended standard, IEC 62471 base)

gap.en: NIS IEC 62471 and CN GB/T 20145 share the IEC 62471 risk-group framework, so the classification method is the same. The practical gap is in status and process: in China GB/T 20145 is recommended-only and may be absent from a CCC dossier, whereas for Nigeria the photobiological risk-group report is expected as part of the SONCAP Product Certificate test package for in-scope LED products. A CN-spec product may therefore lack a current EN/NIS-aligned IEC 62471 report. Manufacturers exporting to Nigeria should: (1) hold a defensible IEC 62471 risk-group classification to the SON-accepted edition from a SON-recognised lab; (2) ensure RG2/RG3 products carry the required warnings; (3) include the report in the SONCAP PC dossier. Most general-purpose LED luminaires are RG0 or RG1 with no usage restriction, but the classification must still be documented for the certificate.
gap.zh: NIS IEC 62471 与中国 GB/T 20145 共享 IEC 62471 危险组别框架，故分类方法相同。实际差距在状态与流程：在中国 GB/T 20145 仅为推荐性，可能不在 CCC 档案中，而在尼日利亚，光生物危险组别报告应作为范围内 LED 产品 SONCAP 产品证书检测档案的一部分。因此中国规格产品可能缺少现行的、与 NIS 一致的 IEC 62471 报告。向尼日利亚出口的制造商应：（1）持有按 SON 接受版本、由 SON 认可实验室出具的可辩护 IEC 62471 危险组别分类；（2）确保 RG2/RG3 产品附带所需警示；（3）将报告纳入 SONCAP PC 档案。大多数通用 LED 灯具为 RG0 或 RG1，无使用限制，但分类仍须为证书记录。
gap.zht: NIS IEC 62471 與中國 GB/T 20145 共享 IEC 62471 危險組別框架，故分類方法相同。實際差距在狀態與流程：在中國 GB/T 20145 僅為推薦性，可能不在 CCC 檔案中，而在奈及利亞，光生物危險組別報告應作為範圍內 LED 產品 SONCAP 產品證書檢測檔案的一部分。因此中國規格產品可能缺少現行的、與 NIS 一致的 IEC 62471 報告。向奈及利亞出口的製造商應：（1）持有按 SON 接受版本、由 SON 認可實驗室出具的可辯護 IEC 62471 危險組別分類；（2）確保 RG2/RG3 產品附帶所需警示；（3）將報告納入 SONCAP PC 檔案。大多數通用 LED 燈具為 RG0 或 RG1，無使用限制，但分類仍須為證書記錄。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory (within SONCAP) — photobiological risk-group report to NIS IEC 62471 expected as part of the SONCAP Product Certificate test package for in-scope LED light sources and luminaires
mandatory_status.cn: Recommended — GB/T 20145-2006 is a recommended (non-mandatory) standard; enforcement for residential luminaires is not uniformly prescribed

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Photobiological safety for Nigeria is assessed against NIS IEC 62471 (risk groups RG0–RG3) and the report is expected within the SONCAP Product Certificate package for in-scope LED products. The classification method matches China's IEC 62471-based GB/T 20145, but the CN standard is recommended-only and may be missing from a CCC dossier — so a CN-spec product can lack a current SON-accepted report. Hold a defensible IEC 62471 classification from a SON-recognised lab, document RG2/RG3 warnings where applicable, and include the report in the SONCAP dossier.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 尼日利亚的光生物安全依据 NIS IEC 62471（危险组别 RG0–RG3）评估，报告应纳入范围内 LED 产品的 SONCAP 产品证书档案。分类方法与中国基于 IEC 62471 的 GB/T 20145 一致，但中国标准仅为推荐性且可能不在 CCC 档案中——故中国规格产品可能缺少现行的 SON 接受报告。须持有由 SON 认可实验室出具的可辩护 IEC 62471 分类，在适用时记录 RG2/RG3 警示，并将报告纳入 SONCAP 档案。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 奈及利亞的光生物安全依據 NIS IEC 62471（危險組別 RG0–RG3）評估，報告應納入範圍內 LED 產品的 SONCAP 產品證書檔案。分類方法與中國基於 IEC 62471 的 GB/T 20145 一致，但中國標準僅為推薦性且可能不在 CCC 檔案中——故中國規格產品可能缺少現行的 SON 接受報告。須持有由 SON 認可實驗室出具的可辯護 IEC 62471 分類，在適用時記錄 RG2/RG3 警示，並將報告納入 SONCAP 檔案。

requirement_topic.en: Risk-Group Marking and Warnings on Product / Packaging (SON labelling)
requirement_topic.zh: 产品/包装上的危险组别标志与警示（SON 标签）
requirement_topic.zht: 產品/包裝上的危險組別標誌與警示（SON 標籤）

summary.en: Under SONCAP and the NIS IEC 62471 framework, where a lamp or luminaire is classified RG2 or RG3, the product and/or packaging must carry the appropriate photobiological hazard marking and usage warnings derived from the risk-group classification (e.g. cautions on not staring into the operating source, minimum viewing distances, professional-use restrictions for RG3). RG0/RG1 general-service products typically need no special hazard warning but the classification must be on record for the SONCAP Product Certificate. SON also requires that product markings and labelling (rated voltage 230 V, wattage, model, manufacturer/importer details, country of origin) match the certified model and be legible and durable; mismatched or absent markings can cause the per-shipment SONCAP Certificate to be refused. Unlike the EU energy-label regime, Nigeria does not currently mandate a plain-language blue-light-class field on a standardised energy label — the hazard marking instead follows the IEC 62471 risk-group marking convention for RG2/RG3.
summary.zh: 在 SONCAP 及 NIS IEC 62471 框架下，当灯或灯具被分类为 RG2 或 RG3 时，产品和/或包装须带有依危险组别分类得出的相应光生物危害标志及使用警示（如勿凝视工作中的光源、最小观看距离、RG3 的专业用途限制等）。RG0/RG1 通用产品通常无需特殊危害警示，但分类须为 SONCAP 产品证书存档。SON 还要求产品标志及标签（额定电压 230 V、功率、型号、制造商/进口商信息、原产国）与认证型号一致并清晰耐久；标志不符或缺失可能导致每批 SONCAP 证书被拒。与欧盟能效标签制度不同，尼日利亚目前未在标准化能效标签上强制要求通俗语言版蓝光等级字段——危害标志改为遵循 RG2/RG3 的 IEC 62471 危险组别标志惯例。
summary.zht: 在 SONCAP 及 NIS IEC 62471 框架下，當燈或燈具被分類為 RG2 或 RG3 時，產品和/或包裝須帶有依危險組別分類得出的相應光生物危害標誌及使用警示（如勿凝視工作中的光源、最小觀看距離、RG3 的專業用途限制等）。RG0/RG1 通用產品通常無需特殊危害警示，但分類須為 SONCAP 產品證書存檔。SON 還要求產品標誌及標籤（額定電壓 230 V、功率、型號、製造商/進口商信息、原產國）與認證型號一致並清晰耐久；標誌不符或缺失可能導致每批 SONCAP 證書被拒。與歐盟能效標籤制度不同，奈及利亞目前未在標準化能效標籤上強制要求通俗語言版藍光等級字段——危害標誌改為遵循 RG2/RG3 的 IEC 62471 危險組別標誌慣例。

standards_or_laws: NIS IEC 62471 — Photobiological safety of lamps and lamp systems (risk-group marking and warning requirements for RG2/RG3)
SON labelling and marking requirements under SONCAP (product/packaging marking must match the certified model)

summary.en: China's GB/T 20145-2006 carries the same IEC 62471 risk-group marking conventions for RG2/RG3 products, but as a recommended standard it is not uniformly enforced, and the China Energy Label (CEL) under GB 30255 does not include a blue-light-hazard class. CN-market packaging therefore commonly shows energy-efficiency grade and lumen output rather than a photobiological hazard marking. There is no CN regulatory requirement to display a plain-language blue-light class on the luminaire energy label.
summary.zh: 中国 GB/T 20145-2006 对 RG2/RG3 产品采用相同的 IEC 62471 危险组别标志惯例，但作为推荐性标准并未统一执行，且 GB 30255 下的中国能效标识（CEL）不包含蓝光危害等级。因此中国市场包装通常显示能效等级与光通量输出，而非光生物危害标志。中国无规定要求在灯具能效标签上显示通俗语言版蓝光等级。
summary.zht: 中國 GB/T 20145-2006 對 RG2/RG3 產品採用相同的 IEC 62471 危險組別標誌慣例，但作為推薦性標準並未統一執行，且 GB 30255 下的中國能效標識（CEL）不包含藍光危害等級。因此中國市場包裝通常顯示能效等級與光通量輸出，而非光生物危害標誌。中國無規定要求在燈具能效標籤上顯示通俗語言版藍光等級。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 20145-2006 — Photobiological safety of lamps and lamp systems (recommended; RG2/RG3 marking conventions)
GB 30255-2019 — China Energy Label for LED room luminaires (no blue-light-hazard class field)

gap.en: Both Nigeria (NIS IEC 62471) and China (GB/T 20145) use the same IEC 62471 risk-group marking convention, so RG2/RG3 hazard marking is technically aligned. The gap is enforcement and the SONCAP marking-match rule: (1) CN GB/T 20145 is recommended-only and CN-spec packaging may omit the hazard marking, whereas SONCAP expects RG2/RG3 marking to be present and consistent with the certified classification; (2) SON's general marking requirements demand that voltage (230 V), wattage, model, manufacturer/importer, and origin on the product/packaging match the certified model — mismatched markings can trigger refusal of the per-shipment SONCAP Certificate; (3) unlike the EU, Nigeria does not require a plain-language blue-light class on a standardised energy label, so the obligation is the IEC 62471 hazard marking (for RG2/RG3) plus accurate model markings, not an EU-style label field. Update artwork for the Nigerian market: 230 V ratings, importer of record details, and RG2/RG3 warnings where the classification requires them.
gap.zh: 尼日利亚（NIS IEC 62471）与中国（GB/T 20145）使用相同的 IEC 62471 危险组别标志惯例，故 RG2/RG3 危害标志技术上一致。差距在执行与 SONCAP 标志一致规则：（1）中国 GB/T 20145 仅为推荐性，中国规格包装可能省略危害标志，而 SONCAP 期望 RG2/RG3 标志存在并与认证分类一致；（2）SON 一般标志要求产品/包装上的电压（230 V）、功率、型号、制造商/进口商及原产国与认证型号一致——标志不符可能触发每批 SONCAP 证书被拒；（3）与欧盟不同，尼日利亚不要求在标准化能效标签上标注通俗语言版蓝光等级，故义务为 IEC 62471 危害标志（针对 RG2/RG3）加上准确的型号标志，而非欧盟式标签字段。须为尼日利亚市场更新设计：230 V 定额、登记进口商信息，以及分类要求时的 RG2/RG3 警示。
gap.zht: 奈及利亞（NIS IEC 62471）與中國（GB/T 20145）使用相同的 IEC 62471 危險組別標誌慣例，故 RG2/RG3 危害標誌技術上一致。差距在執行與 SONCAP 標誌一致規則：（1）中國 GB/T 20145 僅為推薦性，中國規格包裝可能省略危害標誌，而 SONCAP 期望 RG2/RG3 標誌存在並與認證分類一致；（2）SON 一般標誌要求產品/包裝上的電壓（230 V）、功率、型號、製造商/進口商及原產國與認證型號一致——標誌不符可能觸發每批 SONCAP 證書被拒；（3）與歐盟不同，奈及利亞不要求在標準化能效標籤上標註通俗語言版藍光等級，故義務為 IEC 62471 危害標誌（針對 RG2/RG3）加上準確的型號標誌，而非歐盟式標籤字段。須為奈及利亞市場更新設計：230 V 定額、登記進口商信息，以及分類要求時的 RG2/RG3 警示。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory (RG2/RG3) — photobiological hazard marking and warnings to NIS IEC 62471 required for RG2/RG3 products; SON requires product/packaging markings to match the certified model for SONCAP Certificate issuance
mandatory_status.cn: Not required as a label field — GB/T 20145 RG2/RG3 marking is recommended-only and the China Energy Label (GB 30255) has no blue-light-hazard class

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] For Nigeria, RG2/RG3 LED products require IEC 62471 photobiological hazard marking and warnings, and SON requires product/packaging markings (230 V rating, wattage, model, manufacturer/importer, origin) to match the certified model — mismatches can cause refusal of the per-shipment SONCAP Certificate. The marking convention matches China's GB/T 20145, but that CN standard is recommended-only and CN packaging may omit the marking. Unlike the EU, Nigeria has no standardised blue-light-class label field; the obligation is IEC 62471 hazard marking plus accurate, model-consistent markings re-worked for the Nigerian 230 V market and importer of record.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 就尼日利亚而言，RG2/RG3 LED 产品须有 IEC 62471 光生物危害标志及警示，且 SON 要求产品/包装标志（230 V 定额、功率、型号、制造商/进口商、原产国）与认证型号一致——不符可能导致每批 SONCAP 证书被拒。标志惯例与中国 GB/T 20145 一致，但该中国标准仅为推荐性，中国包装可能省略标志。与欧盟不同，尼日利亚无标准化蓝光等级标签字段；义务为 IEC 62471 危害标志加上为尼日利亚 230 V 市场及登记进口商重做的、与型号一致的准确标志。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 就奈及利亞而言，RG2/RG3 LED 產品須有 IEC 62471 光生物危害標誌及警示，且 SON 要求產品/包裝標誌（230 V 定額、功率、型號、製造商/進口商、原產國）與認證型號一致——不符可能導致每批 SONCAP 證書被拒。標誌慣例與中國 GB/T 20145 一致，但該中國標準僅為推薦性，中國包裝可能省略標誌。與歐盟不同，奈及利亞無標準化藍光等級標籤字段；義務為 IEC 62471 危害標誌加上為奈及利亞 230 V 市場及登記進口商重做的、與型號一致的準確標誌。
